---
title: "rig list"
---

<!-- Generated by website/gen-cli-reference.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

## `rig list`

```text
Description:
  List installed R versions. It does _not_ check if they are working
  properly.

  `rig ls` is an alias.

Usage: rig list [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --json
          JSON output

      --plain
          plain output, only the version names, one per line

      --user
          Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

      --admin
          Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')
```
